entries.original: Standalone installs are more self-contained, and `codex app` now opens or installs Desktop correctly on Windows and Intel Macs (#17022, #18500).
entries.translated: 오래된 코어 `models.json` 제거 및 활성 모델 카탈로그 갱신을 위한 릴리스 준비 과정 업데이트 (#18585)

entries.original: The TUI can open `/side` conversations for quick side questions, and queued input now supports slash commands and `!` shell prompts while work is running (#18190, #18542).
entries.translated: Azure responses 제공자를 위한 원격 압축 지원

entries.original: Plan Mode can start implementation in a fresh context, with context-usage shown before deciding whether to carry the planning thread forward (#17499, #18573).
entries.translated: `SECURITY.md`에 보안 경계 참조 추가

entries.original: Plugin workflows now include tabbed browsing, inline enable/disable toggles, marketplace removal, and remote, cross-repo, or local marketplace sources (#18222, #18395, #17752, #17751, #17277, #18017, #18246).
entries.translated: `start-codex-exec.sh` 의존성 자동 설치

entries.original: Filesystem permissions now support deny-read glob policies, managed deny-read requirements, platform sandbox enforcement, and isolated `codex exec` runs that ignore user config or rules (#15979, #17740, #18096, #18646).
entries.translated: 아카이브/아카이브 해제 기능을 로컬 `ThreadStore`로 마이그레이션

entries.original: Tool discovery and image generation are now enabled by default, with higher-detail image handling and original-detail metadata support for MCP and `js_repl` image outputs (#17854, #17153, #17714, #18386).
entries.translated: 원격 `exec-server` 파일 시스템 테스트 복구

entries.original: App-server approvals, user-input prompts, and MCP elicitations now disappear from the TUI when another client resolves them, instead of leaving stale prompts behind (#15134).
entries.translated: 원격 확인 후 오래된 `app-server` 요청 무시

entries.original: Remote-control startup now tolerates missing ChatGPT auth, and MCP startup cancellation works again through app-server sessions (#18117, #18078).
entries.translated: 다시 활성화

entries.original: Resumed and forked app-server threads now replay token usage immediately so context/status UI starts with the restored state (#18023).
entries.translated: 대체 마켓플레이스 매니페스트 및 로컬 문자열 지원

entries.original: Security-sensitive flows were tightened: logout revokes managed ChatGPT tokens, project hooks and exec policies require trusted workspaces, and Windows sandbox setup avoids broad user-profile and SSH-root grants (#17825, #14718, #18443, #18493).
entries.translated: PR 17848의 추가 변경 사항 되돌리기

entries.original: Sandboxed `apply_patch` writes work correctly with split filesystem policies, and file watchers now notice files created after watching begins (#18296, #18492).
entries.translated: MCP 이미지 출력의 `original-detail` 메타데이터 지원

entries.original: Several TUI rough edges were fixed, including fatal skills-list failures, invalid resume hints, duplicate context statusline entries, `/model` menu loops, redundant memory notices, and terminal title quoting in iTerm2 (#18061, #18059, #18054, #18154, #18580, #18261).
entries.translated: 독립형 설치 프로그램 대폭 개선

entries.original: Added a security-boundaries reference to `SECURITY.md` for sandboxing, approvals, and network controls (#17848, #18004).
entries.translated: 이전에 호출되었으나 현재 누락된 도구를 위한 더미 도구 추가

entries.original: Documented custom MCP server approval defaults and exec-server stdin behavior (#17843, #18086).
entries.translated: PR 17848의 `SECURITY.md`

entries.original: Updated app-server docs for plugin API changes, marketplace removal, resume/fork token-usage replay, and warning notifications (#17277, #17751, #18023, #18298).
entries.translated: Updated app-server docs for plugin API changes, marketplace removal, resume/fork token-usage replay, and warning notifications (#17277, #17751, #18023, #18298).

entries.original: Added a short guide for the responses API proxy (#18604).
entries.translated: Added a short guide for the responses API proxy (#18604).

entries.original: Split plugin and marketplace code into `codex-core-plugins`, moved more connector code into `connectors`, and continued breaking up the large core session/turn modules (#18070, #18158, #18200, #18206, #18244, #18249).
entries.translated: Split plugin and marketplace code into `codex-core-plugins`, moved more connector code into `connectors`, and continued breaking up the large core session/turn modules (#18070, #18158, #18200, #18206, #18244, #18249).

entries.original: Refactored config loading and `AGENTS.md` discovery behind narrower filesystem and manager abstractions (#18209, #18035).
entries.translated: Refactored config loading and `AGENTS.md` discovery behind narrower filesystem and manager abstractions (#18209, #18035).

entries.original: Stabilized Bazel and CI with flake fixes, native Rust test sharding, scoped repository caches, stronger Windows clippy coverage, and updated `rules_rs`/LLVM pins (#17791, #18082, #18366, #18350, #18397).
entries.translated: Stabilized Bazel and CI with flake fixes, native Rust test sharding, scoped repository caches, stronger Windows clippy coverage, and updated `rules_rs`/LLVM pins (#17791, #18082, #18366, #18350, #18397).

entries.original: Added core CODEOWNERS and a smaller development build profile (#18362, #18612).
entries.translated: Added core CODEOWNERS and a smaller development build profile (#18362, #18612).

entries.original: Removed the stale core `models.json` and updated release preparation to refresh the active model catalog (#18585).
entries.translated: Removed the stale core `models.json` and updated release preparation to refresh the active model catalog (#18585).
